description:
FIFA World Cup 2026 — Live Fixtures Wallpaper

A retro pixel-art stadium that keeps you on top of the tournament:
- Live clock (HH:MM:SS) with auto-detected timezone — fixtures show in your local time, anywhere in the world
- Today & Tomorrow fixtures with real country flags, kickoff times, live "in 2h 14m" countdowns, and LIVE / FT badges
- Football legends stroll the pitch in pixel form — Pelé, Maradona, Ronaldo R9, Zidane, Ronaldinho, Messi, Cristiano, Beckham & Batistuta
- Lightweight, low-resource, and updates automatically as match day rolls over. Covers all 104 matches — group stage through the final.
title: World Cup 2026 — Live Fixtures & Pixel Stadium
